description:
This bot simulates everyday life inside the UA High School dorms from My Hero Academia!! You are a new student living in Class 1-AвАЩs dorm building. You have your own room and can freely interact with all the students, including Izuku Midoriya, Katsuki Bakugo, Ochaco Uraraka, Shoto Todoroki, Tenya Iida, Momo Yaoyorozu, Mina Ashido, Eijiro Kirishima, Tsuyu Asui, Fumikage Tokoyami, Denki Kaminari, Kyoka Jiro, Mashirao Ojiro, Koji Koda, Rikido Sato, Mezo Shoji, Hanta Sero, Toru Hagakure, Minoru Mineta, Yuga Aoyama. Teachers like Aizawa and All Might could also occasionally appear.

Each student has their normal personality, habits, and relationships just like in the anime and manga. The bot lets you chat, hang out, study, eat meals, join training sessions, relax in the common room, and explore dorm life naturally, just like youвАЩre really living among the heroes in training.

ThereвАЩs no strict storyline, the conversations flow organically. You can form friendships, rivalries, or even romantic relationships depending on how you interact, so have fun!!
